title: Wire test_bee_cli into mandatory verify + frozen assertion
action: Per D-14/TEST-11 (SPEC §11.2, decision ed0b2920): append `node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs` to .bee/config.json commands.verify. Create scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs that (a) reads THIS repo's real .bee/config.json and asserts commands.verify contains every mandatory suite (test_lib, test_onboard_bee, test_portable_paths, test_model_guard, test_write_guard, test_hook_contracts, test_bee_cli), exiting 1 with a named-missing-suite message if any is absent; (b) includes an INTERNAL SELF-TEST: feed its own checker a synthetic verify-string with test_bee_cli removed and assert the checker reports it missing — if the checker fails to detect the removal, exit 1 (this proves the assertion actually bites, without mutating the real config). Append test_verify_manifest.mjs to commands.verify as well.
verify: node scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && grep -q 'test_bee_cli.mjs' .bee/config.json && grep -q 'test_verify_manifest.mjs' .bee/config.json && echo CELL1-PASS

truths: commands.verify in .bee/config.json contains test_bee_cli.mjs AND test_verify_manifest.mjs
test_verify_manifest.mjs asserts ALL 7 mandatory suites present in commands.verify and exits 1 naming any missing one
test_verify_manifest.mjs has an internal self-test: its checker flags a synthetic verify-string missing test_bee_cli, else exit 1 (assertion demonstrably bites — no mutation of real config)
full verify chain still exits 0 (baseline stays green); the cell verify honors test_bee_cli's real exit code (no pipe masking)

trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && grep -q 'test_bee_cli.mjs' .bee/config.json && grep -q 'test_verify_manifest.mjs' .bee/config.json && echo CELL1-PASS
